name: Raw Apple Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the apples; do not peel them.
2. Cut the apples crosswise into half-inch slices, then into half-inch chunks.
3. Sprinkle the apple pieces with lemon juice.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and toss to mix well.
5. Makes 6 servings.
6. A fine accompaniment to roast pork, pork chops, baked ham or ham slices, or smoked pork butt.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 66.7 calories; 1.2 grams total fat (0.2 grams saturated fat); 0.2 grams protein; 8.6 grams carbohydrates; 0 milligrams cholesterol; 255.6 milligrams sodium.
